main: High clashing E.G.O with 3 atk weight and decent damage buffs based on {st:Combustion} on her target.
other: Adds +4 power, {st:Combustion}, damage, and SP support (for E.G.Os) to every 4th skill use after using this E.G.O.

passiveList.desc: Every 4th Skill this unit uses gains Final Power +4 and inflicts 4 [Combustion] On Hit
passiveList.name: 4th Match Flame

passiveList.desc:
Every 4th Skill this unit uses gains Final Power +4 and inflicts 4 [Combustion] On Hit
- If the said Skill is a Wrath Skill, deal +([Combustion] Potency on all targets / 2)% additional damage (max 20%)
- If the said Skill is an E.G.O Skill, apply the following effects at Coin Start of the first Coin:
· If the said Coin is a Plus Coin, heal 10 SP
· If the said Coin is a Minus Coin, lose 15 SP (this effect cannot reduce this unit's SP below -40)
passiveList.name: 4th Match Flame
